description_long: This picnic table is constructed from dark brown wooden planks, featuring a rustic and natural appearance. The tabletop is composed of several unevenly cut wooden boards, giving it a handcrafted look. The table is supported by thick, cylindrical wooden legs, some of which are angled outward for stability. Two bench seating areas are attached on either side, each made from matching wooden planks and supported by similar cylindrical legs. The structure includes vertical and horizontal wooden beams that reinforce the frame and connect the benches to the main table. Metal bolts or fasteners are visible at the joints, adding to the table's sturdy and robust design.
description: A rustic wooden picnic table with uneven planks, sturdy cylindrical legs, and attached benches, reinforced by horizontal and vertical beams.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tabletop, two attached benches, and the supporting cylindrical legs with visible fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the benches, the tabletop's width, and the structural beams connecting the benches to the table.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the underside of the table, the arrangement of the legs, and the connection points of the benches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the bench and tabletop planks, as well as the vertical support posts and crossbeams.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by multiple thick cylindrical wooden legs, reinforced by horizontal and vertical wooden beams that connect the benches and provide additional stability.
